features.title: Script hardening
features.description: JSDoc type annotations on all lib exports, runtime schema validation in readState() and readFeatures(), circular dependency detection in selectNextFeature(), standardized error handling (UserError throws), and git message injection fix via spawnSync args array.
steps: Verify all 5 lib modules (state.mjs, features.mjs, git.mjs, progress.mjs, artifacts.mjs) have JSDoc @typedef and @param/@returns on every exported function
Call readState() with JSON missing required fields and verify it throws UserError with descriptive message
Call readFeatures() with malformed JSON (missing version, non-array features, feature missing id/required/passes) and verify UserError thrown
Create a features.json with circular depends_on (A->B->A) and verify selectNextFeature() reports the cycle as an error
Verify autoCommit() in git.mjs uses spawnSync with args array (no shell string concatenation)
Verify autoCommit() throws UserError on git failure instead of returning {ok: false}
Verify updateTimestamp() in progress.mjs throws UserError when progress.md is missing
Run all existing subcommands and confirm no regressions
features.notes: Foundation feature -- all other features depend on the hardened lib.

features.title: Feature-update subcommand
features.description: New feature-update subcommand in harness-companion.mjs with --id, --set-passes, --set-status, --set-maturity flags. New writeFeatures() and updateFeature() functions in features.mjs with atomic write and validation.
steps: Run feature-update --id F-015 --set-passes true and verify features.json is updated atomically
Run feature-update --id F-015 --set-status done --set-maturity reviewed and verify both fields updated
Run feature-update --id INVALID-ID and verify UserError with unknown feature ID message
Run feature-update --id F-015 --set-maturity bogus and verify UserError for invalid maturity value
Verify writeFeatures() uses atomic write pattern (write .tmp then rename)
Verify updateFeature() reads, validates, mutates single feature, and writes back
Verify feature-update is registered in harness-companion.mjs subcommand dispatch
features.notes: Depends on F-015 for hardened features.mjs with schema validation.

features.title: Per-step metrics
features.description: New lib/metrics.mjs module with recordMetrics() and readMetrics(). Enhanced cost_tracking with file_changes and evaluation_scores. New metrics-summary subcommand for aggregated output.
steps: Verify lib/metrics.mjs exports recordMetrics(), readMetrics(), and summarizeMetrics()
Call recordMetrics() with file_changes and evaluation_scores data and verify it writes to cost_tracking in state.json
Run metrics-summary subcommand and verify JSON output contains total rounds, total duration, total file changes, and score trends
Verify atomic write via writeState() for metric data
Verify zero npm dependencies maintained
Verify metrics-summary is registered in harness-companion.mjs
features.notes: Depends on F-015 for hardened state.mjs. Simplification policy: may drop score-trend aggregation if duration tracking alone passes.

features.title: Structured event logging
features.description: New lib/events.mjs with logEvent() and readEvents(). Append-only .harness/events.jsonl with typed events. New log-event and read-events subcommands.
steps: Verify lib/events.mjs exports logEvent(type, payload) and readEvents(filter?)
Call logEvent('agent_spawned', {agent: 'test'}) and verify .harness/events.jsonl has one JSON line with timestamp, event_type, and payload
Call logEvent() multiple times and verify append-only behavior (no read-modify-write)
Run log-event --type phase_changed --payload '{"phase":"contract"}' and verify events.jsonl updated
Run read-events and verify all events returned as JSON array
Run read-events --type agent_spawned and verify filtered results
Run read-events --since 2026-04-01T00:00:00Z and verify date filtering works
Verify event types include: agent_spawned, phase_changed, feature_selected, evaluation_completed, commit_made
Verify log-event and read-events registered in harness-companion.mjs
features.notes: Depends on F-015 for hardened lib foundation. Independent of F-017.

features.title: Postmortem command
features.description: New plugins/harness/commands/postmortem.md skill command that reads evaluation artifacts, state.json, features.json, and events.jsonl to generate .harness/postmortem.md with Timeline, Score Trends, Failure Analysis, Process Compliance, and Recommendations sections.
steps: Verify plugins/harness/commands/postmortem.md exists and is a valid command file
Verify postmortem.md is registered in plugin.json commands array
Verify the command instructs the agent to read: evaluation artifacts, state.json, features.json, events.jsonl
Verify the command template includes all 5 sections: Timeline, Score Trends, Failure Analysis, Process Compliance, Recommendations
Verify the command delegates synthesis to the LLM (not the script layer)
Run the postmortem command and verify .harness/postmortem.md is generated with correct structure
features.notes: Depends on F-017 (metrics data) and F-018 (event log). Simplification policy: may drop Recommendations section if synthesis proves unreliable.
